languages.text: "Осада окончена. Но одна выигранная битва не способна затушить пожар войны. Они осыпают меня безыскусными славословиями, величают спасителем династии... и все же я не могу отделаться от мысли: а не я ли собственными руками подписал ей приговор? Что, если артефакта, лежащего передо мной, окажется недостаточно? Но там, где мне удалось обрести одну реликвию, могут скрываться и другие. Если на то будет воля Бога-Императора, я отыщу их. Никто не должен узнать о кластере, который я обнаружил. Никто не должен вмешаться в мои поиски. Я прикажу Абросио не вносить варп-маршруты в архивы его почтенного дома. А если я потерплю неудачу... Тогда, быть может, мои потомки сумеют завершить то, что начал я. Личный когитатор династии на Даргонусе я нахожу достаточно древним и преданным, чтобы доверить ему координаты. Идентификатор доступа — "Лария". Он откроет потаенные секции памяти духа машины. Надеюсь, именно я прочту этот журнал по возвращении... и уничтожу это свидетельство недопустимого малодушия".

А если я потерплю неудачу... Тогда, быть может, мои потомки сумеют завершить то, что начал я. Личный когитатор династии на Даргонусе я нахожу достаточно древним и преданным, чтобы доверить ему координаты. Идентификатор доступа — "Лария". Он откроет потаенные секции памяти духа машины. Надеюсь, именно я прочту этот журнал по возвращении... и уничтожу это свидетельство недопустимого малодушия".

languages.text: "The siege is over. But it takes more than a single battle won to snuff the flames of war. They are showering me with their artless praise, they are lauding me as the saviour of the dynasty... and yet I cannot shake the thought that it may be my hand that signed its death warrant. What if the artefact in front of me now is not enough? Yet the place where I found this relic may hold still more. The God-Emperor willing, I shall find them. No one must know about the cluster I discovered. No one must interfere in my search. I will order Abrosio not to record the warp routes in the archives of his esteemed House. And should I fail... Then perhaps my descendants might finish what I started. The dynasty's private cogitator on Dargonus seems ancient and loyal enough for me to entrust it with the coordinates. The access identifier is 'Laria.' This will open the secret areas of the machine spirit's memory. I hope I will be the one who reads this journal upon my return... and I hope I will destroy this evidence of my inexcusable faintness of heart."

traits.locale_text:
"The siege is over. But it takes more than a single won battle to quell the flames of war. They are showering me with their artless praise; they are lauding me as the saviour of the dynasty... and yet I cannot shake the thought that it may be my hand that signed its death warrant. What if the artefact in front of me will not be enough?
However, the place where I found this relic may hold yet more. The God-Emperor willing, I shall find them. No one must know about the cluster I discovered. No one must interfere in my search. I will order Abrosio not to record the warp routes in the archives of his esteemed House.
And should I fail... Then perhaps my descendants might finish what I started. The dynasty's private cogitator on Dargonus seems ancient and loyal enough for me to entrust it with the coordinates. The access identifier is 'Laria'. It will open the hidden compartments of the machine spirit's memory. I hope I will be the one who reads this journal upon my return... and I hope I will destroy this testimony of my inexcusable faintness of heart."

languages.text: “围城结束了。但仅凭一场胜仗并不足以熄灭战火。他们用空洞乏味的溢美之词赞颂我，把我吹捧成王朝的救星……然而我始终摆脱不了一个念头：或许签下王朝死刑判决书的人，正是我自己。要是我眼前这件圣物还不足以令王朝繁荣昌盛呢？不过，我找到这件圣物的地方，或许还藏着更多宝物。若神皇保佑，我定会找到它们。绝不能让人知晓我发现的星团。绝不能让人干涉我的搜寻。我会命令阿布罗西奥不得将亚空间航线记录进他那尊贵家族的档案里。要是我失败了……也许我的后人能完成我的未竟之业。达戈努斯那台王朝私有的沉思者，看上去足够古老，也足够忠心，我可以放心将坐标托付给它。访问标识符是‘菈丽雅’。这能开启机魂记忆中的隐秘区域。我希望，等我归来时，再翻开这本日记的人依旧是我……也希望我能亲手毁掉这证实了我内心软弱的证物。”
languages.original_text: "The siege is over. But it takes more than a single battle won to snuff the flames of war. They are showering me with their artless praise, they are lauding me as the saviour of the dynasty... and yet I cannot shake the thought that it may be my hand that signed its death warrant. What if the artefact in front of me now is not enough? Yet the place where I found this relic may hold still more. The God-Emperor willing, I shall find them. No one must know about the cluster I discovered. No one must interfere in my search. I will order Abrosio not to record the warp routes in the archives of his esteemed House. And should I fail... Then perhaps my descendants might finish what I started. The dynasty's private cogitator on Dargonus seems ancient and loyal enough for me to entrust it with the coordinates. The access identifier is 'Laria.' This will open the secret areas of the machine spirit's memory. I hope I will be the one who reads this journal upon my return... and I hope I will destroy this evidence of my inexcusable faintness of heart."

languages.text: «El asedio ha terminado, pero no basta una batalla para sofocar las llamas de la guerra. No dejan de proclamar mis alabanzas, de loarme por salvar la dinastía... y, sin embargo, no puedo sacudir la sensación de que he firmado su condena. ¿Y si el artefacto que tengo ante mí no basta? Por otra parte, el lugar donde encontré esta reliquia podría contener otras. Dios Emperador mediante, las encontraré. Nadie más debe saber del cúmulo que encontré. Nadie debe interferir en mi búsqueda. Le ordenaré a Abrosio que no registre las rutas de disformidad en los anales de su estimada casa. Y, si fracaso... tal vez mis descendientes puedan terminar lo que he empezado. El cogitador privado de la dinastía en Dargonus es antiguo y lo bastante leal como para que le confíe las coordenadas. El identificador de acceso es "Laria". Abrirá las zonas secretas de la memoria del espíritu máquina. Espero ser yo quien lea esto al volver de mi viaje... y espero poder destruir esta prueba de mi inexcusable debilidad».
languages.original_text: "The siege is over. But it takes more than a single battle won to snuff the flames of war. languages.text: « Le siège est terminé, mais il nous faudra plus qu'une simple victoire pour étouffer les flammes de la guerre. On m'inonde de fades louanges, on me porte aux nues comme le sauveur de la dynastie... Et pourtant, l'idée que j'ai peut-être signé sa perte me hante. Et si l'artefact que j'ai devant moi ne suffisait pas ? Cependant, le lieu dans lequel j'ai découvert la relique pourrait ne pas avoir livré tous ses secrets. Si l'Empereur-Dieu le veut, je les percerai. Personne ne doit savoir ce que j'ai découvert. Personne ne doit interférer avec mes recherches. J'ordonnerai à Abrosio de s'abstenir d'inscrire le trajet dans les archives de son honorable maison. Et si je devais échouer... Alors, peut-être que mes descendants termineront ce que j'ai commencé. Le cogitateur privé de la dynastie sur Dargonus semble suffisamment ancien et loyal pour que je puisse lui confier les coordonnées. L'identifiant d'accès est « Laria ». Cela révélera les parties cachées de la mémoire de l'esprit de la machine. J'espère que je reviendrai pour ouvrir à nouveau ce journal... et que je pourrai détruire la preuve de mon inexcusable faiblesse. »
languages.original_text: "The siege is over. But it takes more than a single battle won to snuff the flames of war. They are showering me with their artless praise, they are lauding me as the saviour of the dynasty... and yet I cannot shake the thought that it may be my hand that signed its death warrant. What if the artefact in front of me now is not enough? Yet the place where I found this relic may hold still more. The God-Emperor willing, I shall find them. No one must know about the cluster I discovered. No one must interfere in my search. I will order Abrosio not to record the warp routes in the archives of his esteemed House. And should I fail... Then perhaps my descendants might finish what I started. The dynasty's private cogitator on Dargonus seems ancient and loyal enough for me to entrust it with the coordinates. The access identifier is 'Laria.' This will open the secret areas of the machine spirit's memory. I hope I will be the one who reads this journal upon my return... and I hope I will destroy this evidence of my inexcusable faintness of heart."

languages.text: "Kuşatma bitti. Fakat savaşın alevlerini söndürmek için kazanılmış tek bir muharebeden fazlası gerekir. Beni sanatkârca olmayan övgülere boğuyorlar, beni hanedanlığın kurtarıcısı olarak yüceltiyorlar... Yine de ölüm fermanını imzalayanın kendi elim olabileceği düşüncesinden kurtulamıyorum. Ya şu an önümdeki yadigâr yeterli değilse? Bu yadigârı bulduğum yer, daha fazlasını barındırıyor olabilir. Tanrı İmparator'un izniyle onları bulacağım. Keşfettiğim kümeyi kimse bilmemeli. Kimse aramama müdahale etmemeli. Abrosio'ya öteboyut rotalarını saygıdeğer hanesinin arşivlerine kaydetmemesini emredeceğim. Başarısız olacak olursam... O zaman belki torunlarım başladığım işi bitirebilir. Dargonus'taki hanedanlığın özel kavramsayarı, koordinatları ona emanet edebileceğim kadar kadim ve sadık. Erişim kimliği 'Laria'. Bu kimlik, makine ruhunun hafızasındaki gizli bölgeleri açacaktır. Umarım döndüğümde bu günlüğü okuyan ben olurum... Ve umarım bu affedilemez korkaklığımın kanıtını yok ederim."
languages.original_text: "The siege is over. But it takes more than a single battle won to snuff the flames of war. They are showering me with their artless praise, they are lauding me as the saviour of the dynasty... and yet I cannot shake the thought that it may be my hand that signed its death warrant. What if the artefact in front of me now is not enough? Yet the place where I found this relic may hold still more. The God-Emperor willing, I shall find them. No one must know about the cluster I discovered. No one must interfere in my search. I will order Abrosio not to record the warp routes in the archives of his esteemed House. And should I fail... Then perhaps my descendants might finish what I started. The dynasty's private cogitator on Dargonus seems ancient and loyal enough for me to entrust it with the coordinates. Bu yadigârı bulduğum yer, daha fazlasını barındırıyor olabilir. Tanrı İmparator'un izniyle onları bulacağım. Keşfettiğim kümeyi kimse bilmemeli. Kimse aramama müdahale etmemeli. Abrosio'ya öteboyut rotalarını saygıdeğer hanesinin arşivlerine kaydetmemesini emredeceğim.

languages.text: "Die Belagerung ist vorbei. Aber es bedarf mehr als einer gewonnenen Schlacht, um die Flammen des Krieges zu löschen. Sie überschütten mich mit ihrer arglosen Verehrung, feiern mich als den Erlöser der Dynastie ... und doch werde ich den Gedanken nicht los, dass meine Hand möglicherweise ihr Todesurteil unterschrieben hat. Was, wenn das Artefakt vor mir nicht genug ist? Wobei der Ort, an dem ich dieses Relikt fand, noch mehr Schätze enthalten könnte. So der Gottimperator will, werde ich sie finden. Niemand darf von dem Cluster erfahren, den ich entdeckt habe. Niemand darf meine Suche stören. Ich werde Abrosio befehlen, die Warprouten in den Archiven seines geschätzten Hauses nicht zu verzeichnen. Und sollte ich scheitern ... werden meine Nachkommen vielleicht vollenden, was ich begonnen habe. Der Privatcogitator der Dynastie auf Dargonus scheint mir alt und loyal genug zu sein, um ihm die Koordinaten anzuvertrauen. Der Zugangsidentifikator ist 'Laria'. Er öffnet die geheimen Bereiche der Erinnerung des Maschinengeistes. Ich hoffe, dass ich es sein werde, der dieses Tagebuch nach meiner Rückkehr liest ... und dass ich diesen Beweis der unentschuldbaren Schwäche meines Herzens zerstören werde."
languages.original_text: "The siege is over. But it takes more than a single battle won to snuff the flames of war. traits.locale_text:
"Die Belagerung ist vorbei. Aber es bedarf mehr als einer gewonnenen Schlacht, um die Flammen des Krieges zu löschen. Sie überschütten mich mit ihrer arglosen Verehrung, feiern mich als den Erlöser der Dynastie ... und doch werde ich den Gedanken nicht los, dass meine Hand möglicherweise ihr Todesurteil unterschrieben hat. Was, wenn das Artefakt vor mir nicht genug ist?
Wobei der Ort, an dem ich dieses Relikt fand, noch mehr Schätze enthalten könnte. So der Gottimperator will, werde ich sie finden. Niemand darf von dem Cluster erfahren, den ich entdeckt habe. Niemand darf meine Suche stören. Ich werde Abrosio befehlen, die Warprouten in den Archiven seines geschätzten Hauses nicht zu verzeichnen.
Und sollte ich scheitern ... werden meine Nachkommen vielleicht vollenden, was ich begonnen habe. Der Privatcogitator der Dynastie auf Dargonus scheint mir alt und loyal genug zu sein, um ihm die Koordinaten anzuvertrauen. Der Zugangsidentifikator ist 'Laria'. Er öffnet die geheimen Bereiche der Erinnerung des Maschinengeistes. Ich hoffe, dass ich es sein werde, der dieses Tagebuch nach meiner Rückkehr liest ... und dass ich diesen Beweis der unentschuldbaren Schwäche meines Herzens zerstören werde."

languages.text: 「包囲戦は終わった。しかし、戦争の炎を消すには、単に戦いに勝つだけでは足りない。彼らは私の無邪気な賛辞を浴びせ、王朝を救った英雄として称えている。それでも、私の手によって王朝が死の宣告を受けたかもしれないという考えを払拭できない。目の前の神器が足りないかもしれない。しかし、私がこの遺物を発見した場所には、もっと多くのものがあるかもしれない。神皇帝の御加護があれば、私はそれらを見つけ出すだろう。私が発見した群れは、誰にも知ってはならない。私の探求に干渉する者はいない。私はアブロシオに、彼の名高い家系に記録するよう命じるだろう。そしてもし私が失敗したら… 私の子孫が、私が始めたことを完成させるかもしれない。ダゴナスにある王朝専用の思考機は、古く忠実なもので、私はその座標を託せる。アクセス識別子は「ラリア」である。これは機械霊の記憶の秘密領域を開く鍵である。私は帰還時にこの日記を読み、私の許しがたい臆病さを証明する証拠を破壊することを願う。」
languages.original_text: "The siege is over. But it takes more than a single battle won to snuff the flames of war. They are showering me with their artless praise, they are lauding me as the saviour of the dynasty... and yet I cannot shake the thought that it may be my hand that signed its death warrant. What if the artefact in front of me now is not enough? Yet the place where I found this relic may hold still more. The God-Emperor willing, I shall find them. No one must know about the cluster I discovered. No one must interfere in my search. I will order Abrosio not to record the warp routes in the archives of his esteemed House. And should I fail... Then perhaps my descendants might finish what I started. The dynasty's private cogitator on Dargonus seems ancient and loyal enough for me to entrust it with the coordinates. The access identifier is 'Laria.' This will open the secret areas of the machine spirit's memory. I hope I will be the one who reads this journal upon my return... and I hope I will destroy this evidence of my inexcusable faintness of heart."

traits.locale_text: 「包囲戦は終わった。しかし、戦争の炎を消すには、単に戦いに勝つだけでは足りない。彼らは私の無邪気な賛辞を浴びせ、王朝を救った英雄として称えている。それでも、私の手によって王朝が死の宣告を受けたかもしれないという考えを払拭できない。目の前の神器が足りないかもしれない。しかし、私がこの遺物を発見した場所には、もっと多くのものがあるかもしれない。神皇帝の御加護があれば、私はそれらを見つけ出すだろう。私が発見した群れは、誰にも知ってはならない。私の探求に干渉する者はいない。私はアブロシオに、彼の名高い家系に記録するよう命じるだろう。そしてもし私が失敗したら… 私の子孫が、私が始めたことを完成させるかもしれない。ダゴナスにある王朝専用の思考機は、古く忠実なもので、私はその座標を託せる。アクセス識別子は「ラリア」である。これは機械霊の記憶の秘密領域を開く鍵である。私は帰還時にこの日記を読み、私の許しがたい臆病さを証明する証拠を破壊することを願う。」
